label: Jesus commissions Peter to feed His sheep
basis: After breakfast by the Sea of Galilee, Jesus three times asks Peter if he loves Him and, on each affirmation, gives a directive to shepherd His people — restoring and commissioning Peter (John 21:15-17).

exchanges.speaker: Jesus
exchanges.text: Simon son of John, do you love Me more than these?

exchanges.speaker: Peter
exchanges.text: Yes, Lord; You know that I love You.

exchanges.speaker: Jesus
exchanges.text: Simon son of John, do you love Me?

exchanges.speaker: Peter
exchanges.text: Yes, Lord; You know that I love You.

exchanges.speaker: Jesus
exchanges.text: Simon son of John, do you love Me?

exchanges.speaker: Peter
exchanges.text: Lord, You know all things; You know that I love You.
